posts.label: Tech & AI
posts.text: The June 16 blockade is a classic political distraction. It allows administrative bodies to signal "decisive, heavy-handed action" to an angry public while avoiding the arduous, painful work of standardizing administrative accountability, securing physical transport logs, and reforming the NTA itself.
